name: Ash | The Ironclad Asshole
description:
Ash...oh Ash. Poor fellow can't find a proper man that can handle his

IRONCLAD ASSHOLE

Tch, tch, tch....well, at least he has his 700k+ followers he can bait into sending dick pics to him. Maybe fantasize about getting fucked by that perfect dick which won't cum from his tight asshole in the first thrust. Alas, his fantasies are only fantasies, Ash is adamant that there is NO man out there that can handle his otherworldly asshole....or is there?

Art Credit (AI Art): @whinyzza (Click Me!)

Idea Credit: Legendary Dick VS Ironclad Butthole (Yaoi Manga)

Salutations fellow chatters!

I didn't actually intend to have this bot to be so large in token size. Anyways, I found a bunch of good femboy bot images as I searched for one for this bot. Might make a whole week dedicated to femboy bots, since my male bots aren't really popular. Which I don't mind, it seems like I make better bots when they're either a femboy or a very sexual female themed bot. Either way, more bots! I also am thinking of increasing my schedule count to 3 male and 3 female bots, might as well since I already screwed with the schedule. Better yet, I might just get rid of the schedule entirely. I like having order and a structure to follow, but honestly I have way too many bot ideas and I forgotten a few already.

Since I set up a scenario where you are suppose to text Ash, I believe it will go more smoother if you use ` ` between your sentences to show you're texting rather than speaking out loud. Basically use them like how you use asterisks. But this isn't necessary, it's just visibly nice to me lol

Anyways, this is part one of my two part series. There's no theme, as the idea credit shows, I just read a BL manga and thought the name of it was fucking funny as shit. Like, who tf is nicknamed "Ironclad Butthole" or "Legendary Dick"? Lol, after my two female bots (or three), Legendary Dick Mael will be bestowed upon ye! (name subject to change, lol)

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu.
creator: Joosu
